scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install
scripts.run: FRONTEND_PORT=$((CONDUCTOR_PORT + RANDOM % 10000 + 10000)) && (cd server && PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT CORS_ORIGIN=https://localhost:$FRONTEND_PORT node index.js) & VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT npm run dev -- --port $FRONTEND_PORT && wait
